text:
When Update SRC-SYS with cvsup (date=2010.09.13.07.25.00) to (date=2010.09.13.07.26.00). Recompile GENERIC KERNEL can't boot. The last infomation of boot is Wireless NIC cards message. When reboot want power off.

MACHINE:
Lenovo ideapad Y430
CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM)2 Duo CPU T6400 @ 2.00GHz (1995.05-MHz 686-class CPU)
